# Annotations.Priority property

OPTIONAL. Importance from 0 (least) to 1 (most), inclusive. A value outside the inclusive 0..1 range is rejected on deserialisation (R-14.6-c, R-14.6-d).

```csharp
public double? Priority { get; set; }
```
